_meta.description: Periodic survey datapoints quantifying enterprise adoption + measurable ROI from AI agent deployments.
_meta.convention: roi_pct = % of surveyed enterprise leaders reporting measurable ROI. sample_size = # respondents. Surveys vary in methodology and selection bias — `methodology_note` captures the key caveats (vendor-customer panel vs neutral, self-reported vs audited, etc.).
_meta.update_cadence: as new primary surveys publish (Anthropic, BCG, McKinsey, IBM, Gartner, Stanford AI Index)
_meta.score_mapping: score_engine._enterprise_roi_score reads `roi_pct` series and uses the latest value directly as the 0-100 score (with no scaling — ROI percentage IS the score). Sample size and survey count appear in headlines.

surveys.source: Anthropic — How enterprises are building AI agents in 2026
surveys.methodology_note: 500+ technical leaders surveyed by Anthropic; 'measurable ROI' is self-reported by respondents. Vendor-customer panel skew likely.
